textByHashes.8d38d594dff289986d6db6cd1779613047c73173: This is the dense essence mine. The essence we gather here is used across Arceuus, and indeed all of Kourend. If you wish, you are welcome to mine some yourself.
textByHashes.ab512efa8593ad55a8507f8574a0fc65125bbe0b: I have a question for you.
textByHashes.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
textByHashes.4e887cf48b5809750e1420b140eb331f19f08a25: The mages of Arceuus seek dense essence for their experiments. I see you have blocks; we require . Donations will be marked with gratitude.
textByHashes.770b1640818075ceb687b0d2f29432bf4173983c: Your donation has been gratefully recieved.
textByHashes.55387ad9be720511ab9c89d6c9765f7d0878ec0f: We do not require any dense essence from you at present. Thank you for your support.
